# polaris_namespace_grant (Resource)

Grants a namespace-level privilege to a Polaris catalog role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_catalog_role" "reader" {
  catalog = "prod"
  name    = "reader"
}

resource "polaris_namespace_grant" "example" {
  catalog      = polaris_catalog_role.reader.catalog
  catalog_role = polaris_catalog_role.reader.name
  namespace    = ["sales"]
  privilege    = "NAMESPACE_LIST"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `catalog` (String) The name of the catalog. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `catalog_role` (String) The name of the catalog role receiving the grant. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `namespace` (List of String) Namespace path as an ordered list of components (e.g. ["sales", "us"]). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `privilege` (String) The namespace-level privilege to grant (e.g. NAMESPACE_CREATE, TABLE_READ_DATA). Changing this forces a new resource.
